name: Czechoslovakian Goulash
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round steak, cut into pieces
A few dashes of Worcestershire sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the cut-up pieces of meat.
2. Season with chili powder, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add chopped vegetables (carrots, potatoes, cabbage) to the pan.
4. Pour in V-8 vegetable juice.
5. Add ketchup and Worcestershire sauce to taste.
6. Add water as needed.
7. Cook until the vegetables are tender and the meat is done.
